prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度显示：计算机类为'推荐'（偏热），电子信息/通信为'高热推荐'，电气工程及其自动化为'高热推荐'，这些工科专业社会热度高，可能吸引更多考生报考。河北省物理类考生2025年约36.3万人，2026年估算约36.5万人，基本持平。省控线方面，物理类本科批2025年459分，较2024年448分上升11分，竞争门槛略有提高；辽宁大学位于辽宁省沈阳市，与河北省相邻。该校在河北省招生计划持续扩大，2025年在河北总招生约18人（占全国总招生比例约3%），属于外省招生中规模中等偏小的省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合物理类位次波动剧烈、2026年大幅扩招约14.3%、工科专业社会热度高等因素，在2025年基准48060名基础上，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次继续后移。预测最低位次约52129名，区间51629-52629名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated dramatically: approximately 19505 → 21536 → 69642 → 30257 → 48060. In 2023, due to a gap, the ranking abnormally shifted to 69642, rebounded significantly to 30257 in 2024, and then moved back to 48060 in 2025. Over the past three years, the ranking fluctuation range was about 30,000 to 70,000, with a baseline of approximately 48060 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Physics Category has been continuously expanding: 36 in 2021 → 32 in 2022 → 35 in 2023 → 58 in 2024 → 91 in 2025 → 104 in 2026, with an increase of about 14.3% in 2026 compared to 2025. The significant increase in enrollment slots has intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks approximately 125th in the Soft Science China University Rankings (2026), placing it in the lower-middle tier of 211 universities. In recent reputation monitoring, no significant negative or positive public opinion events have occurred. On Douyin platform, it ranks 105th in popularity, with a rating of 'average,' indicating low overall attention and no obvious popularity fluctuation signals. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Liaoning University only received an A- rating for Applied Economics. Among the majors offered in the Physics Category, engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines, and the university's engineering strength is relatively weak.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows: Computer Science is 'recommended' (slightly hot), Electronic Information/Communication is 'highly recommended and hot,' and Electrical Engineering and Automation is 'highly recommended and hot.' These engineering majors have high social popularity, potentially attracting more applicants. The number of Physics Category examinees in Hebei Province was approximately 363,000 in 2025 and is estimated to be about 365,000 in 2026, remaining basically stable. Regarding provincial control lines, the undergraduate batch for Physics Category in 2025 was 459 points, an increase of 11 points from 448 points in 2024, slightly raising the competition threshold. Liaoning University is located in Shenyang City, Liaoning Province, adjacent to Hebei Province. The university's enrollment plan in Hebei Province has been continuously expanding, with a total of about 18 students enrolled in Hebei in 2025 (accounting for about 3% of the national total enrollment), making Hebei a medium-to-small-scale province in terms of out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the drastic fluctuations in Physics Category rankings, the significant enrollment expansion of about 14.3% in 2026, and the high social popularity of engineering majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 48060, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to decline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 52129, with a range of 51629 to 52629.

Tier 1 majors such as Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, and Computer Science are highly popular, requiring rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (approximately within 51000) for a serious attempt. Tier 2 majors cover a wide range and are suitable for candidates in the middle of the range. Among Tier 3 majors, Economics and Finance, although corresponding to A- disciplines, have diverging social popularity and can be considered as safe choices. Majors in Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged by social trends, so caution is advised when applying.

学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Among History Category majors, Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade, etc., can be mapped to Applied Economics (A-); Accounting, Business Administration, etc., belong to Business Administration (no A-level rating); Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism, etc., belong to Chinese Language and Literature/Journalism and Communication (no A-level rating).

专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows: Accounting/Finance/Auditing is 'recommended' (relatively hot), Law is 'divergent and wait-and-see', Chinese Language/Literature is 'recommended' (relatively hot), Journalism and Communication is 'clearly discouraged', and Finance/Economics is 'divergent and wait-and-see'. 预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the approximately 14% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hebei Province, and the rise in provincial control lines, based on the 2025 baseline of 5546, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly move back.
